videos.title: The Making Of "Face of Winter" | U.S. Ski Team In New Zealand
videos.description:
After a record-breaking 2018 Winter Olympic team gold medal, the United States Cross-Country team hasn’t done much resting. Instead, athletes like Jessie Diggins, Sophie Caldwell, Simi Hamilton and other teammates have continued training hard in the beautiful New Zealand landscape. Go behind the scenes and learn about how this team is really like a family.

Subscribe to our eNewsletter: https://pages.e.aimmedia.com/wme_newsletter_signup/

Find us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/WarrenMillerEntertainment

Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/WarrenMillerEnt

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/WarrenMillerEnt/

videos.title: Sam Morse First World Cup Points - Downhill | 2017 Audi FIS World Cup Finals | Aspen Snowmass
videos.description: ASPEN, Colorado (March 15, 2017) – Italy’s Peter Fill, finished second for the fourth time this season to win the downhill title by 23 points. Fi’s countryman Dominik Paris won the race, as Swiss Carlo Janka was third.

videos.description: Get an in-depth look at the United States’ top skiers and daily sacrifices they must endure to remain at the pinnacle of their sport.  http://outsidetelevision.com/find-us

videos.title: In Search of Speed | S.3, Ep.5 | Never a Dull Moment on the World Cup
videos.description: As Mikaela Shiffrin sets her hopes on garnering her first Downhill win, race day in Lake Louise gets off to an unexpected start.

videos.title: First Tracks - Alpine - 2015/2016
videos.description: Once a year, at the beginning of the season, both the men's and women's U.S. Alpine teams come together with fans at the U.S. Speed Center at Copper Mountain to train and celebrate a new season of competition. This is an inside look.
